arts.ttl: Son Heung-min's long-term future clear as Ange Postecoglou spells out Tottenham plan
arts.sum: Son Heung-min is showing no signs of slowing down with Ange Postecoglou backing Tottenham's captain to remain among Premier League's elite for years to come

arts.ttl: Arne Slot tactically outclasses Pep Guardiola: Is Liverpool manager best in the Premier League after Manchester City win?
arts.sum: Liverpool beat Manchester City 2-0 last Sunday and boss Arne Slot's tactical brilliance arguably makes him the best manager in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Report: Man City get huge boost in race for Florian Wirtz as Arsenal receive Guler disappointment
arts.sum: Bayern Munich have turned their attention to Real Madrid’s Arda er after conceding defeat in the race for Bayer Leverkusen star Florian Wirtz, according to reports. Fichajes claims that though Wirtz has long been a target for the German giants, but with interest from Arsenal, Manchester City, and Real Madrid, his next move appears to […] The post Report: Man City get huge boost in race for Florian Wirtz as Arsenal receive Guler disappointment appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Tottenham: Ange Postecoglou reveals triple injury boost as he confirms Europa League plan
arts.sum: First-choice centre-backs closing in on a welcome return to action for Spurs

arts.ttl: Every word Ange Postecoglou said on new Bentancur contract, Ben Davies injury and Timo Werner
arts.sum: Postecoglou and his players will need to be wary of a City response but if they could win it would mean the north London outfit would have triumphed in all six games they have played against Manchester opposition his season. I know for them they are going through a rough trot, but their football is still a real challenge to play against but it’s a great challenge.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou outlines why Mathys Tel will prove 'really outstanding' at Tottenham
arts.sum: Mathys Tel may not have the physical profile of Dominic Solanke but Ange Postecoglou reckons Tottenham's new attacking arrival can be effective in other ways once he is fully fit

arts.ttl: Hugo Lloris performs Daniel Levy U-turn and makes confident Tottenham prediction
arts.sum: Hugo Lloris, now playing in the MLS with LAFC, has defended under-fire Tottenham chairman Daniel Levy and also backed his former side to taste Europa League glory

arts.ttl: ‘Elite’ Son Heung-min not slowing down – Ange Postecoglou
arts.sum: Spurs attacker Son Heung-min has 13 goal involvements against Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola: Kevin De Bruyne has to decide on his future
arts.sum: De Bruyne is one of several of City’s older generation with question marks over their futures.

arts.ttl: Man City get John Stones injury boost amid shock Ruben Dias revelation and Oscar Bobb update
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola offered Manchester City injury updates on Ruben Dias, John Stones and Oscar Bobb ahead of their Premier League trip to Tottenham.
